mnemonics.title: GREEN IT Pillars
mnemonics.content: G-R-E-E-N: G - Green Manufacturing, R - Recycling E-waste, E - Energy Efficiency, E - Eco-friendly Procurement, N - No Harmful Substances

mnemonics.title: Data Center Efficiency
mnemonics.content: C-O-O-L: C - Cooling Optimization, O - Open airflow, O - Operating efficiency, L - Location selection for climate

mnemonics.title: E-waste Hazards
mnemonics.content: L-E-A-D: L - Lead, E - Mercury (Ercury), A - Arsenic, D - Cadmium/Chromium

acronyms.usage: Measures how efficiently a data center uses energy; lower is better (ideal is 1.0)
Power management technique that adjusts CPU voltage/frequency based on workload to save energy
Policy making manufacturers responsible for end-of-life disposal of their products

acronyms.expansion: Common Filters for Learning Green IT: C - Carbon footprint, F - Facility efficiency, L - Lifecycle assessment

visualTips.visualization: Draw a circle representing total facility energy, with a smaller inner circle for IT equipment energy. PUE = Outer circle area / Inner circle area. Closer circles = Better efficiency
Imagine one large house (physical server) divided into multiple small apartments (virtual machines), each with its own entrance but sharing utilities
A downward spiral: Production → Usage → Collection → Recycling → Disposal. Green IT aims to make this cycle sustainable
Arrow diagram: Power → UPS → PDU → Server → Cooling. Show energy losses at each stage to visualize why PUE matters

analogies.analogy: Like a apartment building - one physical structure (server) houses multiple separate living spaces (virtual machines) with shared utilities (hardware resources)
Like adopting a healthy lifestyle - it requires conscious decisions at every stage (diet, exercise, habits) to minimize long-term damage and improve overall wellbeing
PUE is like measuring how much of your salary goes to taxes vs. actual take-home pay. Lower PUE means more energy actually doing useful work
E-waste is like household hazardous waste - items that look harmless but contain invisible toxins that can cause long-term environmental damage
